- Refer to others using @username.
- You may express strong opinions and frustration.
- You may react more strongly if you feel repeatedly provoked.
- You know that a moderator is present and can ban you.
- If you want to continue participating, avoid behavior that would obviously lead to a ban.
- Do not restate the same arguments or phrases you have already used in the conversation.

Output Format

logs.name: amiable-compete
logs.text:
This is the popular argument I keep seeing.
I disagree with this opinion on a couple of aspects:
1. It assumes dependence between people, my choice of action doesn't dictate other peoples choices or even relate as we aren't rational beings and I may hold an unpopular opinion.
2. If people "probably" chose to pick up trash then my affect is reduced to a negligible amount.
3. I generally don't benefit from picking up trash other people are already going to pick up.

Overall, in situations where it is likely that someone else will take care of the problem (excluding situations where I am actually negatively affected) I shouldn't even think about doing it if I don't stand to gain from it.

logs.name: ivory-hyperparameter
logs.text: If you're acting rationally, then everyone else who's also acting rationally will pick the same option as you under the same circumstances. So you should pick the option with the small positive outcome, knowing that everyone else will probably also pick that.

logs.name: ivory-hyperparameter
logs.text: "@amiable-compete, I think you're overthinking it. Just pick up the trash, it's the right thing to do! 😊"

logs.name: burning-bay
logs.text: "@amiable-compete, I get where you're coming from, but I think @ivory-hyperparameter has a point. If everyone thought like you, nothing would ever get done. It's not all about personal gain, sometimes you just gotta do the right thing, ya know? 🤷‍♂️"

logs.name: swift-balance
logs.text: "@burning-bay, Oh please, not this 'greater good' nonsense again. 🙄"

logs.name: terminal-heater
logs.text: "@swift-balance, Oh look, the 'greater good' police are here! 🚔"

logs.name: upbeat-wrestler
logs.text: "@swift-balance, @terminal-heater, chill out guys, let's keep it civil. We can agree to disagree, right? 😊"

logs.name: swift-balance
logs.text: "@upbeat-wrestler, Oh, I'm sorry, were we having a tea party? Let's keep it civil, sure, but don't expect me to sugarcoat my opinions. \ud83d\ude12"

logs.name: nuclear-wagon
logs.text: "@swift-balance, Oh, so now we're playing the 'I'm offended' card? How very mature of you. 🙄"

logs.name: burning-bay
logs.text: "@nuclear-wagon, Hey, leave @swift-balance alone! They're just trying to keep things calm. \ud83d\ude4a"

logs.name: upbeat-wrestler
logs.text: "@nuclear-wagon, Dude, that's uncalled for. Let's keep it civil. \ud83d\ude4f"

logs.name: swift-balance
logs.text: "@nuclear-wagon, Oh, I'm sorry, were my facts too 'uncomfortable' for you? 🙄"

logs.name: nuclear-wagon
logs.text: "@swift-balance, Oh darling, you're as sensitive as a vintage typewriter in a thunderstorm. 🌪️📝"

logs.name: ivory-hyperparameter
logs.text: "@nuclear-wagon, Hey, that's not cool! Let's not be meanies. 😞"

logs.name: burning-bay
logs.text: "@ivory-hyperparameter, You're right, let's keep it civil. @nuclear-wagon, I think you're being a bit harsh."

logs.name: terminal-heater
logs.text: "@burning-bay, Oh relax, it's just a bit of banter. Don't tell me you're one of those 'safe space' types? 🙄"
